summary: Routed Today check-in header copy, per-axis Energy/Mood/Sleep tier phrases, the Train compact readiness summary, and the Train session-card readonly readout through localization keys plus a shared presentation helper. Added 14 readiness.* keys to all 19 locale Localizable.strings (296 keys total, up from 282; 13 plural keys unchanged). New Core/Application/ReadinessSummaryPresentation.swift exposes todayCheckInLabel(energy:mood:sleep:layout:), trainingReadinessSummary(for:), and sessionReadinessReadout(level:). Non-English locales remain English placeholders per the translation-quality policy. Domain rules (ReadinessRules, ReadinessOutcomeRules) unchanged; digest insight copy and today.readiness.scale.accessibility stringsdict entries untouched.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-readiness-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: TodayView.readinessSummaryLabel returned 7 hardcoded English Strings depending on layout flags and concatenated per-axis tag phrases (`Energy low`, `Mood okay`, `Sleep high`) inline. TrainView.trainingReadinessSummary returned 4 hardcoded Strings. The TrainView session card readout interpolated `Readiness \(level)/5` verbatim. None of these had matching keys in Localizable.strings; non-English locales rendered the English literals regardless of locale.
contract_status_changes.after: Three TodayView and TrainView surfaces delegate to Core/Application/ReadinessSummaryPresentation.swift. 14 keys under the readiness.* namespace are present in all 19 locales with English placeholder values (296 keys total, 13 plural keys unchanged). localization-string-inventory.md and localization-dynamic-formatting.md updated; readiness summaries are no longer in the deferred bucket.

residual_risks: Non-English locales render English placeholder text for the new readiness keys; this matches the existing translation-quality policy and is gated on the reviewer-intake workflow.

The per-axis tier format %@ low / %@ okay / %@ high places the axis name first. Some target languages may prefer reversed order; reviewers can rewrite the format string per-locale without code changes.

I did not exercise the new copy under the all-locale screenshot harness; the existing launch-surface screenshots show the Today check-in label in its default 'Tap to check in' state, which is visually unchanged.

Today.readinessSummaryLabel is now an indirection through the helper. Any test that targets the rendered text continues to work because the English output is byte-identical to the prior inline branching; tests that targeted the helper's structure directly would be a new path.
Train session card readout rendering is unchanged ('Readiness 4/5'); only the localization plumbing differs.
recommended_next_reason: Clean stop is valid. Remaining deferred dynamic-formatting candidates are weekly digest insight/highlight summaries (DigestListView/DigestDetailView interpolations) and any remaining model-backed accessibility interpolation outside the already-implemented today.readiness.scale.accessibility stringsdict. Pick one explicitly before reopening the queue.
